concepts.finding:
As both research on infrastructure as well as on algorithms is quickly evolving,
there is a lack of understanding of challenges and best practices for ML model management.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

concepts.finding:
In this paper, we discuss a selection of ML use cases, develop an overview
over conceptual, engineering, and data-processing related challenges arising in the management of the
corresponding ML models, and point out future research directions.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

corresponding ML models

concepts.finding:

of agreed-upon best practices as well as from the difﬁculties of building complex systems based on components
in different programming languages (Section 3.3).

direction here is to tackle the challenges stemming from the lack of a common declarative abstraction for end-
to-end ML, and to design new languages that support relational algebraic and linear primitives at the same time
(and can reason about them them holistically [19, 20]).
